subjects.description: Two small crumpled white polythene bags of ordinary carrier-bag size, semi-transparent thin plastic material, lying flat and still on the asphalt road surface ahead of the ego vehicle on a calm, wind-free day
subjects.appearance_details: Both are ordinary small grocery carrier bags; one is slightly more crumpled, the other a little flatter; both have wrinkled, shiny surfaces catching light; faint printed text or logos partially visible on one bag
subjects.relationship: The bags are the perceived obstacles that cause the ego vehicle to decelerate and stop
subjects.location: Center foreground to center midground, on the road surface directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame, consistent with ordinary grocery-sized polythene bags; remaining small even as the vehicle closes distance and never appearing oversized
subjects.orientation: Lying at slightly different angles, resting still and flat on the road
subjects.pose: Lying flat on the road, still and motionless
subjects.action: Lying motionless on the asphalt in the still air, not moving
subjects.state_changes: The bags lie still on the road throughout; as the vehicle slows and stops, they become more prominent as small, still objects due to the reduced distance

background_setting: A road through an industrial zone at early morning in dense fog, viewed from inside a moving vehicle; warehouses, fences and utility poles fade to grey silhouettes at short range, damp asphalt underfoot. The air is calm and still, only the mist drifting slowly. Two small stray polythene bags lie still on the damp road ahead, resolving out of the fog as the vehicle nears.

lighting.conditions: Early morning, dense fog, low visibility
lighting.direction: Flat, directionless diffused light through thick mist
lighting.shadows: No distinct shadows; everything softened and shadowless in the fog
lighting.illumination_effect: Low-contrast grey illumination with sharply reduced range; the small white polythene bags are among the few saturated forms resolving from the mist

aesthetics.composition: First-person dashcam framing quickly swallowed by fog, hood faintly visible at the bottom; the road and the small bags emerge from grey ahead
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted damp greys, with the small white polythene bags as the only saturated accents cutting through the mist
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Mundane foggy commute disrupted by a whimsical encounter; cautious, mildly humorous tension
aesthetics.patterns: Faint repeating lane markings dissolving into fog

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving dashcam-style shot that decelerates sharply and abruptly to a complete stop early in the clip; subtle vibrations consistent with vehicle motion that smooth out once the vehicle halts and then holds completely static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's eye-level perspective, capturing the full road width and surrounding environment
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level, slightly above the road surface consistent with a sedan-height dashboard camera
cinematography.depth_of_field: Deep but visibly hazed by fog at distance
cinematography.focus: Soft in the fog, sharpening on the small bags as they emerge

context: Autonomous driving or dashcam scenario demonstrating a vehicle's cautious response to unexpected debris on the road, potentially for driver-assistance system training or road driving documentation

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward along the foggy industrial road at a moderate speed; two small bags are barely visible ahead resting still on the damp road in the calm, misty air.
The vehicle decelerates sharply and abruptly as the bags resolve from the fog, braking hard and coming to a complete stop by 0:02, treating the small resting bags as obstacles.

The vehicle is fully stopped from the very start of this segment and remains completely stationary for the final three seconds; the small bags stay still on the damp road just a few meters ahead as fog drifts around them.

segments.description: The ego vehicle moves forward at a moderate speed along the foggy industrial road, warehouses fading to grey. Ahead, two small white polythene bags resolve from the mist, resting still on the damp road in the calm air.
segments.key_changes: Polythene bags resolve from barely visible specks toward recognizable small shapes as the vehicle closes distance
segments.camera: Forward-moving dashcam perspective at moderate speed with slight vehicle vibration

segments.description: The vehicle brakes sharply and abruptly as the bags resolve from the fog, decelerating hard and coming to a complete stop by 0:02. The small bags remain still on the road ahead.
segments.key_changes: Speed drops rapidly to zero within this one second; a hard, abrupt halt completed by 0:02
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion decelerating sharply with a pronounced pitch-forward, settling quickly to stationary

segments.description: The vehicle is already fully stopped at the very start of this segment and remains completely motionless for the final three seconds, a few meters behind the bags as fog drifts around them, treating the harmless small bags as road obstacles.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle held at a full stop from the beginning of the segment; camera stationary with minimal idle vibration; bags remain still and motionless on the road
segments.camera: Stationary dashcam view with minimal vibration from idling engine

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the view from inside a vehicle shows a foggy industrial road at early morning, warehouses fading to grey as the vehicle moves forward at a moderate pace in calm, misty air; two small white polythene bags resolve from the fog, resting still on the damp road ahead. Around 0:01, the vehicle begins a sharp, abrupt deceleration as they resolve, braking hard as the small bags sit motionless on the asphalt. By 0:02, the vehicle has come to a complete stop. From 0:02 to 0:05, the vehicle stays fully halted and motionless a few meters behind the two small polythene bags, which remain still on the damp road as fog drifts around them.
audio_description: Ambient muffled foggy-morning audio begins with a dull hush, muffled tire roll on damp asphalt and deadened distant industrial clanks. Around 0:01 the engine note drops sharply and a brief hard-braking sound is audible as the vehicle decelerates abruptly. The air is calm with no wind noise. By 0:02 the tire noise falls to near silence and, from 0:02 to 0:05, a low idle rumble dominates in the muffled still air while the bags rest silently on the road.
